# Agent Transcript — {PROJECT_NAME}

## Purpose
- Keep task assignments and agent conversation turns in one append-only review trail.
- Make it easy to reopen what each agent was asked, what they answered, what changed, and what should happen next.

## Entry format
- Timestamp: short local date and time
- Task assignment: who got what, why, and what outcome was expected
- Conversation turn: who said what to whom, what was decided, and what follow-up it created
- Review path: docs or artifacts the user should open later

## Agent conversation transcript
<!-- agent-conversation-transcript-append -->

## Review path
- Open this file when you want to review agent assignments or conversation turns later.
- Keep entries short and append-only.
- Link to supporting docs, validation output, and artifacts inside the entry itself.
